extDescription.message: A safe, fully offline region-select OCR — no data ever leaves your browser.

popupDescription.message: Click the button or press $KEY$ to select a region on the page for OCR.

viewerDropHint.message: Drag & drop, Ctrl+V to paste, or click the button to select

viewerSelectHint.message: Drag to select the region for OCR (Esc to cancel)

statusCannotRun.message: Cannot run OCR on this page (chrome:// etc.)

optionsDescription.message: Customize region select OCR behavior. Settings sync via your Google account.

optionShowResultAlert.message: Show OCR result in an alert dialog after completion

optionShowResultAlertHint.message: When enabled, the recognized text is shown in a browser alert dialog in addition to being copied to the clipboard.

shortcutsDescription.message: You can change the keyboard shortcut from Chrome's built-in settings page.

shortcutsHint.message: chrome://extensions/shortcuts cannot be opened via a link, so it is opened via this button.

cleaningRulesDescription.message: Applied to OCR results in order (top to bottom) via String.replace just before copying to clipboard. Invalid patterns are skipped automatically.

emptyRulesMessage.message: No rules yet. Click "+ Add Rule" to create one.

importDuplicateConfirm.message: The following rules already exist. Overwrite them?

importErrorMessage.message: Failed to load file. Please check that it is valid JSON.

testingDescription.message: Apply current rules to sample text and preview the result.

rulesHowToDescription.message: Rules use JavaScript RegExp syntax. Flags: g (global), i (case-insensitive), m (multiline), s (dot matches newline), etc.

seedRuleSpaceComment.message: Removes unwanted spaces inserted by OCR between Japanese characters

seedRuleCommaComment.message: Useful for removing digit grouping commas in invoices and financial documents (e.g. 1,000,000 → 1000000)

seedRuleMultiNewlineComment.message: Collapses consecutive blank lines into a single newline

seedRuleNewlineComment.message: Removes all line breaks to join everything into a single line

toastSelectionInstruction.message: Drag to select the region you want to OCR (Esc to cancel)

alertResultCopied.message: OCR Result ($COUNT$ chars) — Copied to clipboard

alertResultCopyFailed.message: OCR Result ($COUNT$ chars) — Failed to copy to clipboard

offscreenJustification.message: Hosts ONNX Runtime Web (WASM) in a Web Worker for local inference
